text:
LABEL: 
Alzheimer's Disease End-of-Year Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: This code specifies whether the beneficiary met the Chronic Conditions Warehouse (CCW) algorithm 
criteria for Alzheimer's disease as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: ALZH 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or have sufficient fee-for-service (FFS) coverage 

1 = Beneficiary met claims criteria but did not have sufficient FFS coverage 
2
